label: F1 FA301626Q0068 (USAF SF-1449) — UNKNOWN ws variant

work_statement_unknown.head: Couldn't confirm from the extracted text
work_statement_unknown.reason: The governing work statement appears to live in an attachment (a Statement of Need / SOW PDF) that wasn't in the parsed solicitation body. SOW vs PWS changes the entire bid approach, so FARaudit reports this as tentative rather than guessing.
work_statement_unknown.action: Upload the attachment to resolve this. It's the single highest-leverage line in the audit — it decides whether you propose a method (SOW) or propose to outcomes (PWS/SOO).

required.title: Health and Safety on Government Installations

reference.title: Restrictions on Subcontractor Sales to the Government
Protecting the Government's Interest When Subcontracting

items.text: SAM.gov registration current and not expiring within 30 days
Annual reps & certs current in SAM

l02_catches.title: Base-access credentialing runs longer than the phase-in window
l02_catches.why_invisible: Every clause is satisfiable on paper, but CAC / installation access takes 6–10 weeks.
l02_catches.move: Submit visit-request package day of award; price remote phase-in for first 30 days.

l02_catches.title: Email-only submission with no portal backup
l02_catches.why_invisible: Two .mil addresses look standard but email delivery failures are undetectable.
l02_catches.move: Send 90+ min early, keep under 10MB, request read receipt, CC second address.

l02_catches.title: FOB Origin quietly pushes freight into your unit price
l02_catches.why_invisible: CLIN 0004 is FOB Origin — bidders who assume Destination under-price by freight delta.
l02_catches.move: Build destination freight into CLIN 0004 unit price; file Q&A to confirm FOB.

confidence_notes.uncertain: NAICS code not extracted from solicitation; assumed from PSC.
confidence_notes.resolve: Confirm against SF-1449 Block 10 before relying on size-eligibility.

confidence_notes.uncertain: No explicit contract-type clause extracted; FFP assumed from CLIN structure.
confidence_notes.resolve: Verify FOB and pricing arrangement in Section B before quoting.
